corrections.note: Printed text reads φαίνεται; transcript has initial δ instead of φ.
Image clearly has οὐ, not γε, and εἴρηκεν with accent; main issue is wrong word.
Circumflex on contracted form visible in image.
Body text reads χρεωκοπουμένων; transcript appears influenced by apparatus abbreviation χρεωκοπ. in Va.
Printed body has βιαιοτέρων; transcript dropped ι.

uncertain.note: Accentuation/breathing around εἴρηκεν is visible but not essential beyond the substantive correction from γε to οὐ.

notes: Body line-initial verse numbers 5–17 are correctly represented as verse markers, not marginal line numbers. Apparatus transcription appears to match the page.
